name: NiyamVerify
description: Verify cryptographic integrity, guardrails, and readiness scores for AI-assisted development.
author: Sairin Technology

inputs.name: targetBranch
inputs.label: Target Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: The branch to compare changes against (e.g. main or origin/main).

inputs.name: strict
inputs.label: Strict Gating
inputs.helpMarkDown: If true, the task will fail the build if any governance violations or readiness scores are below the minimum.

inputs.name: minScore
inputs.label: Minimum Readiness Score
inputs.helpMarkDown: Minimum overall readiness score (0-100) required to pass.

inputs.name: publicKey
inputs.label: Public Key (PEM)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional PEM-encoded Ed25519 public key for zero-trust evidence verification. Can also be provided via the `NIYAM_PUBLIC_KEY` environment variable.

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Niyam Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specify a specific version of Niyam to install. Defaults to 'latest'.
